Account.Name: Operating Checking
Account.Description: Primary operating account - First Bank of Portland

Account.Name: Business Savings
Account.Description: Tax and equipment reserve - First Bank of Portland

Account.Name: Taproom Sales
Account.Description: Taproom draft and to-go sales via Square POS

Account.Name: Wholesale Beer Sales
Account.Description: Self-distribution to Portland bars and restaurants

Account.Name: Merchandise Sales
Account.Description: Apparel, glassware, and limited can releases

Account.Name: COGS - Malt
Account.Description: Base and specialty malt from Pacific Malt Company

Account.Name: Rent Expense
Account.Description: Monthly lease - E Burnside warehouse brewhouse

Account.Name: Utilities
Account.Description: Portland General Electric, NW Natural, water and sewer

Account.Name: COGS - Hops
Account.Description: Hops from Crosby Hops

Account.Name: Payroll Expense
Account.Description: Taproom and cellar staff wages via Gusto

Account.Name: Packaging & Cans
Account.Description: Cans, kegs, labels, and packaging materials

Account.Name: OLCC & Excise Tax
Account.Description: Oregon liquor licensing and federal excise tax

Account.Name: Accounts Receivable
Account.Description: Outstanding wholesale and distribution invoices

Account.Name: Accounts Payable
Account.Description: Outstanding supplier and vendor bills

Account.Name: Inventory Asset
Account.Description: Raw materials and finished beer/merchandise inventory

Account.Name: Brewing Equipment
Account.Description: Brewhouse, fermenters, and canning line

Account.Name: Accumulated Depreciation
Account.Description: Accumulated depreciation on brewing equipment

Account.Name: Merchant & Card Fees
Account.Description: Square and Stripe payment processing fees

Account.Name: Marketing & Events
Account.Description: Taproom events, releases, and coalition sponsorships

Account.Name: Repairs & Maintenance
Account.Description: Brewery equipment repairs and facility upkeep
